meta.title: Search
meta.description: A site-wide search block that queries all public post types with post-type filtering, keyword search, pagination or load-more, and customizable per-page display.

tsx: import { PanelBody, ToggleControl, RangeControl, __experimentalToggleGroupControl as ToggleGroupControl, __experimentalToggleGroupControlOption as ToggleGroupControlOption } from '@wordpress/components';

requiredPatterns.usage: Live SSR preview of PHP-rendered search results in editor
Update block list name when heading changes
Frontend JS for search, filter, and pagination without page reload
pushState/popstate for browser back/forward with search filters

qualityChecklist: TSX and PHP heading/layout structure match
No hardcoded colors - uses theme tokens
Uses renameBlock() for list view naming
AJAX loading announces updates to screen readers

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Editable block title displayed above the search area. Rendered as h2 with text-header-1 (Anton).

attributes.name: searchPlaceholder
attributes.description: Editable placeholder text for the search input field.

attributes.name: displayFilters
attributes.description: Show/hide the post type filter dropdown row below the search bar.

attributes.name: displayPerPage
attributes.description: Show/hide the 'Show N per page' selector on the filter row.

attributes.name: postsPerPage
attributes.description: Default number of results per page. Overridden by user selection via per-page dropdown.

attributes.name: paginationMode
attributes.description: Controls whether results use numbered pagination or a 'Load More' button.

section.notes: Light mode block (not dark like Archive). Uses page background color (off-white).

container.notes: Standard container with 64px gap (gap-gap-7 = 64px at desktop) between heading and filter area per Figma.

heading.notes: Anton Regular 64px per Figma. Editable via RichText. text-header-1 maps to 64px at desktop. Source: Figma heading measurement.

searchInner.notes: Contains filters, results, pagination. 32px gap (gap-gap-5) between main sections.

filtersArea.notes: Contains search form, filter row, active filters, results count. 16px gap between rows.

searchRow.notes: Search bar on its own row per spec override. Contains search input + submit button.

searchInputWrapper.notes: Grid overlay pattern for icon + input. Search icon on left side.

searchInput.notes: Pill-shaped (rounded-full via forms.css), 1px border charcoal, white background. Height ~51px per Figma (min-h-12 from forms.css + padding). Placeholder text editable per spec.

searchIcon.classes: col-1 row-1 order-2 self-center ml-3 *:w-5 *:h-auto pointer-events-none
searchIcon.notes: Search magnifying glass icon, ~15px per Figma. Positioned on left of input via grid overlay.

searchSubmitButton.notes: Search submit button. Pill-shaped primary button. Visible on search row.

filterRow.notes: Second row below search. Contains: filter-by dropdown, clear all, and per-page selector (ml-auto). Per spec: on separate line from search.

filterBySelect.notes: Pill-shaped dropdown (rounded-full from forms.css). 1px border charcoal. Filters by post type. Shows all searchable public post types. Uses the same hidden-input + select multi-select pattern as Archive block.

clearAllButton.notes: Text-only button (no border). 16px uppercase medium. Only visible when filters are active.

perPageSelector.classes: ml-auto flex items-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap shrink-0
perPageSelector.notes: Right-aligned on filter row. Contains: 'Show' label + select dropdown + 'Per Page' label. Per spec: on same line as filter. Pattern from Archive block.

perPageLabel.notes: Label text flanking the per-page dropdown.

perPageDropdown.notes: Pill-shaped dropdown (rounded-full from forms.css). Shows per-page options.

resultsCountRow.notes: Shows '1-9 OF OVER 36 RESULTS'. Underlined text per Figma. 16px uppercase medium.

activeFilters.notes: Active filter pills container. Same pattern as Archive block. Hidden when only Clear All button present.

activeFilterPill.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-1 border border-current rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider
activeFilterPill.notes: Individual active filter pill with remove X icon.

loadingSpinner.notes: Loading spinner shown during AJAX requests. Same pattern as Archive.

resultsContainer.notes: ARIA live region for dynamic content updates. tabindex=-1 for focus management.

resultsList.notes: Single-column grid of search result cards. 32px gap between cards per Figma.

resultCard.classes: search-result-card border border-charcoal rounded-3xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-6 transition-colors hover:border-accent
resultCard.element: a (wrapping article) or article with inner link
resultCard.notes: Full-width card. 1px border charcoal (#1f1f1d), rounded-3xl (~25px per Figma, closest is 24px/rounded-3xl). Padding 24px (p-6). Internal gap 24px (gap-6). Entire card is a link to the post. hover:border-accent for interactive feedback. Source: Figma card measurements.

cardPostTypePill.classes: inline-block bg-accent-lighter border border-accent-light text-charcoal text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider px-2 py-1.5 rounded-full w-fit
cardPostTypePill.notes: Post type pill using page accent color tokens (bg-accent-lighter, border-accent-light). Dynamic color per page accent. Pattern from resource card taxonomy pills. Source: spec override (follows page accent color) + Figma design (teal color matches default accent).

cardTitle.notes: Post title. NOT in Figma design but required per spec override. Displayed below post type pill. Uses text-header-5 for visual hierarchy.

cardExcerpt.notes: Post excerpt. 16px medium, line-height 1.5 per Figma. Search keyword matches displayed in bold. Source: Figma excerpt measurement.

cardLearnMore.notes: Tertiary button with right arrow. 16px uppercase medium. Arrow icon from theme_asset('images/tertiary-arrow.svg'). Pattern from resource/policy card 'Learn More' buttons.

learnMoreArrow.notes: Arrow icon ~20x16px per Figma. Uses theme tertiary-arrow.svg.

paginationWrapper.notes: Center-aligned per spec override. Contains pagination or load-more button.

paginationNav.notes: WordPress default pagination wrapper. Styled via navigation.css. The progress bar below pagination is a CUSTOM addition specific to this design (see Search.css).

paginationProgressBar.classes: search-pagination-progress mt-2 h-1 rounded-[10px] bg-charcoal/50 overflow-hidden
paginationProgressBar.notes: 4px tall progress bar below pagination numbers. Track: charcoal at 50% opacity. Fill: gradient from neon-green to blue. Width proportional to current/total pages. Source: Figma pagination measurements.

paginationProgressFill.notes: Fill bar inside progress track. Background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-neon-green), var(--color-blue)). Width calculated as percentage of current page / total pages.

loadMoreButton.notes: Load more button (alternative to pagination). Center-aligned per spec. Pattern from Archive block.

noResults.notes: Empty state message when no results found.

mobile.behavior: All elements stack vertically. Search input full width. Filter-by dropdown full width. Per-page selector full width (stacks below filter). Pagination numbers simplify (mid_size: 0). Cards remain single-column. Filter row wraps naturally. Per-page selector drops ml-auto to stack.

tablet.behavior: Search input and submit button share a row. Filter-by dropdown and per-page selector share a row. Cards single-column. Pagination numbers with limited range.

desktop.behavior: Full layout as designed. Search bar on own row (full-width input + submit). Filter row below: filter-by dropdown + clear all on left, per-page selector on right (ml-auto). Results in single column. Pagination centered.

emptyState.field: No results found message when search returns 0 results

fields: displayFilters - controls visibility of filter-by dropdown row
displayPerPage - controls visibility of per-page selector
searchPlaceholder - falls back to 'Search' if empty

editorBehavior.serverSideRender: FilteredServerSideRender with querySelector='.search-inner' for live preview

searchBehavior.postTypes: Queries all public searchable post types (get_post_types(['public' => true, 'exclude_from_search' => false]))
searchBehavior.filterByPostType: Multi-select filter dropdown populated with labels of all searchable public post types. Uses hidden-input + select pattern from Archive block.
searchBehavior.keywordSearch: Text input with AJAX form submission. Updates URL state with search query param.
searchBehavior.resultsCount: Displays 'X-Y OF Z RESULTS' summary above results list.

paginationBehavior.paginationMode: Renders WordPress paginate_links() centered below results. Custom progress bar below pagination numbers showing current page / total pages with gradient fill.
paginationBehavior.loadMoreMode: Renders 'Load More' button centered below results. Appends new results via AJAX without replacing existing ones.
paginationBehavior.perPage: Per-page dropdown allows user to change results count. Updates URL with show_per_page query var. Options: multiples of postsPerPage default (e.g., 9, 18, 27, 36, 45).

ajaxBehavior.description: All filter changes, search submissions, pagination clicks, and load-more clicks use AJAX (fetch) to load new results without full page reload. URL state is managed via pushState/popstate. Loading spinner shown during requests. Results container uses aria-live='polite' for screen reader announcements.

searchCardBehavior.description: Each search result renders via parts/card-search.php template. Card is a full-width clickable link. Post type pill uses accent color tokens. Title displayed below pill. Excerpt below title. Learn More tertiary button below excerpt.
cardContent: Learn More tertiary button with arrow icon

wpPaginationStyling.description: Per spec: pagination style should be applied to default WordPress pagination on the theme. The Search block uses the same navigation.css pagination styles already in the theme. The custom addition is the progress bar below the pagination numbers, which is specific to the Search block and added via Search.css.

patterns.name: Landmarks
keyboardInteractions: No special keyboard interaction for landmarks
ariaRequirements: form with role='search' for the search input area
nav element for pagination with aria-label='Pagination'
aria-live='polite' on results container for dynamic content updates

patterns.name: Button
ariaRequirements: Load More button: role='button' (native), aria-disabled='true' when loading, aria-busy='true' when loading
Clear All button: aria-label='Clear all filters'
Filter pill buttons: role='button' (native), accessible label from text content

decisions.decision: Search bar on its own row, separate from filter controls
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'the search bar should be on its own row'

decisions.decision: Filter-by dropdown filters by post type (not taxonomy), showing all searchable public post types
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'the filter by button will filter by the post type, it should be below the search bar' and 'the filter should show all the searcheable public post types'

decisions.decision: Filters displayed on a new line below search bar, like Archive block
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'the filters should be displayed on a new line, like the Archive block'

decisions.decision: No breadcrumb on search result cards
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'do not include a breadcrumb'

decisions.decision: Post type pill uses page accent color tokens (bg-accent-lighter, border-accent-light) for dynamic color per page accent
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'the pill with the post type of the result will follow the page accent color'. Figma shows #b2eae7/#00b8b0 which are the teal accent defaults. Using accent tokens makes it dynamic. Confirmed by resource card pattern using same accent-lighter/accent-light tokens.

decisions.decision: Post title displayed below post type pill on each card
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'you should display the title of the post below the post type (this is not represented in the design)'

decisions.decision: Excerpt displayed below title, Learn More button below excerpt
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'below the title it should display the excerpt' and 'below the excerpt it should display the learn more button'

decisions.decision: Single column layout (1 post per line)
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'the post card should have the same shape as in the design, 1 post per line'. Confirmed by Figma showing single-column card list.

decisions.decision: Pagination and learn more button center-aligned
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'the learn more or pagination should be center aligned'

decisions.decision: Show N per page selector at top, on same line as the filter dropdown
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'the "show N per page" should be at the top, on the same line as the filter'

decisions.decision: Block has option to choose between load more button or pagination
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'The block should have the option to choose between a load more button or to display pagination'

decisions.decision: Block has option to display or hide filters
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'The block should have an option to display the filters or not'

decisions.decision: Block has option to display or hide per-page selector
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'The block should have an option to display the show N per page or not'

decisions.decision: Block title (heading) and search placeholder are editable
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'The block title and the search placeholder should be editable'

decisions.decision: Pagination style applied to default WordPress pagination on the theme via existing navigation.css
decisions.evidence: Spec states: 'The style for the pagination should be applied to the default wordpress pagination on the theme'. The theme already has navigation.css with pagination styling.

decisions.decision: Light mode block (not dark mode like Archive). Uses page off-white background.
decisions.evidence: Figma screenshot shows light/cream background with charcoal text. No dark overlay or charcoal card background like Archive.

decisions.decision: Heading uses text-header-1 (64px Anton at desktop)
decisions.evidence: Figma measurement shows heading at 64px Anton Regular with line-height 1.1. text-header-1 maps to 64px at desktop in theme typography.

decisions.decision: Card border-radius uses rounded-3xl (24px) as closest match to Figma's 25px
decisions.evidence: Figma shows 25px border-radius on cards. Tailwind rounded-3xl is 24px, difference of 1px which is acceptable per mapping rules.

decisions.decision: Custom pagination progress bar with gradient fill (neon-green to blue) added below pagination numbers in Search.css
decisions.evidence: Figma shows a 4px progress bar below pagination with gradient #b8ff34 -> #47cbf2 (neon-green -> blue) and track at rgba(31,31,29,0.5). This is unique to the Search block.

decisions.decision: No ThemeHeading component - uses inline RichText for heading only. No eyebrow, description, or buttons in header area.
decisions.evidence: Figma shows only a heading ('Search Results') with no eyebrow, description, or buttons above the search area. Simpler than Archive block which uses full ThemeHeading.

decisions.decision: Mobile responsive follows Archive block patterns - elements stack vertically with max-sm:w-full
decisions.evidence: Only desktop Figma provided. Per planning agent rules: keep same relative position, adjust sizing proportionally. Archive block provides the reference responsive pattern.

decisions.decision: Search block does NOT use block variations (unlike Archive). It is a single block that searches all public post types.
decisions.evidence: Spec describes searching across all public post types with post-type as a filter, not per-post-type variations. This is a fundamental difference from the Archive block which uses blockVariation to lock to one post type.

decisions.decision: Query var 'post_type_filter' used for post type filtering via URL. Must be registered in archive-query-vars.php.
decisions.evidence: Follows existing pattern in inc/functions/archive-query-vars.php for registering custom query vars. New var needed for post type filter.

decisions.decision: Search input has white background (bg-white) to match Figma
decisions.evidence: Figma measurement shows search field background: #ffffff (white). This contrasts with the off-white page background.

unresolvedDecisions.question: Should the pagination next arrow use a gradient-filled circle (as shown in Figma) or the existing theme arrow pattern from navigation.css?
options: Use existing navigation.css arrow pattern (consistent with theme)
Create custom gradient circle arrow matching Figma exactly
unresolvedDecisions.defaultIfNotAsked: Use existing navigation.css arrow pattern for consistency. Add gradient progress bar as the unique Search element.
unresolvedDecisions.reason: Figma shows a unique gradient circle arrow for pagination next, but creating a custom pagination arrow would conflict with the spec requirement to 'apply pagination style to default WordPress pagination'. The progress bar already adds the gradient element to the pagination.

postTypeQuery.description: PHP must dynamically query all public, searchable post types using get_post_types(['public' => true, 'exclude_from_search' => false]). This replaces the static post_type_config array used in Archive.
postTypeQuery.code: $searchable_types = get_post_types(['public' => true, 'exclude_from_search' => false], 'objects'); // Optionally exclude 'attachment' and 'page'

filterByPostType.description: The filter dropdown is populated with post type labels. When selected, it adds a post_type_filter query var containing comma-separated post type slugs. The WP_Query uses 'post_type' => array of selected slugs, or all searchable types if no filter.

searchCardTemplate.description: A new parts/card-search.php template renders each search result. Unlike Archive cards which vary by post type, the search card is uniform: pill + title + excerpt + learn more. The post type is detected dynamically via get_post_type_object(get_post_type())->labels->singular_name.

paginationProgressBar.description: The pagination progress bar is rendered as an additional div below the .nav-links. Width of fill calculated as: ($paged / $total_pages) * 100 percent. This is only rendered in the Search block, not globally.

queryVarRegistration.description: Must add 'post_type_filter' to the existing theme_archive_query_vars function in inc/functions/archive-query-vars.php.

variations.demoDescription: Default heading, pagination mode, all options enabled. Tests full rendering with all features visible.
Same content but using Load More pagination mode instead of numbered pagination.

variations.demoTitle: Minimal - No Filters, No Per Page
variations.demoDescription: Filters and per-page selector hidden. Only search bar and results. Tests conditional rendering of optional elements.
Tests editable heading and search placeholder with custom text.
Filters visible but per-page selector hidden. Tests independent toggle behavior.

interactiveTests.name: Search form submission
interactiveTests.expect: Results update via AJAX, URL contains search parameter, loading spinner shows then hides

interactiveTests.name: Post type filter selection
interactiveTests.expect: Results filtered to selected post type, active filter pill appears, URL updates

interactiveTests.name: Clear all filters
interactiveTests.expect: All filters cleared, filter pills removed, results show all post types

interactiveTests.name: Pagination navigation
interactiveTests.expect: Results update to page 2, pagination progress bar advances, page number updates

interactiveTests.name: Per page selector change
interactiveTests.expect: Results refresh with 18 items per page, results count text updates
